_comment: LIVE Go-oracle verdict leg for avalanche-rs (M9.15 Task 6 + C-Chain semantic-verify Task 8): coreth judges Rust-built C-Chain candidate blocks (the honest builder output + 16 adversarial mutations spanning syntacticVerify structural checks, verifyHeaderGasFields fee/gas equality checks, and the semanticVerify family — VerifyTime / VerifyMinDelayExcess / verifyIntrinsicGas / VerifyTargetExponent) over the genesis.json committed beside this corpus.

verdicts.name: bad_coinbase
verdicts.error: syntactic block verification failed: invalid coinbase 0x3333333333333333333333333333333333333333 does not match required blackhole address 0x0100000000000000000000000000000000000000

verdicts.name: far_future_time
verdicts.error: failed to verify block: block timestamp is too far in the future: 64060588800000 > allowed 1784454771891

verdicts.name: mismatched_time_milliseconds
verdicts.error: failed to verify block: TimeMilliseconds does not match header.Time: header.Time (1607144402) != TimeMilliseconds/1000 = (1607144407)

verdicts.name: missing_cancun_tail
verdicts.error: rlp: input string too short for common.Hash, decoding into (types.Block)(types.extblock)(*types.Header)(customtypes.HeaderSerializable).ParentBeaconRoot

verdicts.name: missing_time_milliseconds
verdicts.error: failed to verify block: block timestamp is too old: 0 < parent 1607144400000

verdicts.name: nonzero_nonce
verdicts.error: syntactic block verification failed: expected nonce to be 0 but got 1: invalid nonce

verdicts.name: oversized_ext_data_gas_used
verdicts.error: failed to verify block: failed to verify intrinsic gas: invalid gas used relative to capacity: invalid extra data gas used: 18446744073709551616 is not a uint64

verdicts.name: tampered_fee_state_prefix
verdicts.error: incorrect fee state: expected {Gas:{Capacity:3979000 Excess:21000} TargetExcess:0}, found {Gas:{Capacity:3979000 Excess:281474976731656} TargetExcess:0}

verdicts.name: trailing_sae_tail_field
verdicts.error: failed to verify block: remote target exponent should be nil: 0xe430a5f9aba05ce91224da3bca240a949577ab430c56e8730925b8d315df2c56

verdicts.name: understated_gas_used
verdicts.error: failed to verify block: failed to verify intrinsic gas: total intrinsic gas cost is greater than claimed gas used: intrinsic gas (21000) > claimed gas used (0)

verdicts.name: wrong_block_gas_cost
verdicts.error: invalid block gas cost: have 123, want 0

verdicts.name: wrong_min_delay_excess
verdicts.error: failed to verify block: incorrect min delay excess: expected 7970324, found 18446744073709551615

verdicts.name: wrong_tx_root
verdicts.error: syntactic block verification failed: invalid txs hash 0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111 does not match calculated txs hash 0x10b185a556f26c58a3b9ec54fd02f2a2fcf3b7989cee690ed6ee0df053657eb5

verdicts.name: zero_difficulty
verdicts.error: syntactic block verification failed: invalid difficulty: 0
